creator: growthstarboard@gmail.com
text:
I believe the issue is with the sound. ;) If the game is only compatible with PulseAudio, it may be affected by the problem listed here: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=53297 https://geometrydashworld.net

This is a FreeBSD problem rather than a Wine bug: some functionalities are not implemented in the FreeBSD OSS.
